summary: Completed testing of Check-in Management features for La Maisonette di Paestum B&B app. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly.

issues: Minor: React console warning about missing DialogContent aria-describedby - accessibility improvement recommended

seed_data_creation: Test guest data (TEST_Mario TEST_Rossi) was added via API test to verify guest data update functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Check-in management features fully tested. 3 check-ins exist in the system. One check-in (TEST_Mario TEST_Rossi) has complete guest data including document info. Export Questura returns 1 record (only completed check-ins with guest data). All dates display correctly in DD/MM/YYYY format.

backend_apis.notes: Returns check-ins with correct dates (data_arrivo, data_partenza) from both form and online collections
Successfully updates ospite_principale and accompagnatori data
Returns data in Alloggiati Web format with all required fields
Status update works for form checkins

frontend_ui.notes: Dates display correctly in DD/MM/YYYY format, no 'Invalid Date' errors

Dialog opens with all fields: nome, cognome, data_nascita, luogo_nascita, nazionalita, sesso, tipo_documento, numero_documento, scadenza_documento, luogo_rilascio, foto upload areas, accompagnatori section
Dialog opens with date filters, generates export, shows results table, download TXT button works
Status can be changed via dropdown
